message:
feat(br-2bbt.2.1): enhance toast notifications with severity filtering and new event mappings

Add ToastSeverityThreshold (Info/Warning/Error/Off) controlled by
AM_TUI_TOAST_SEVERITY env var. New toast mappings: MessageReceived,
slow ToolCallEnd (>5s), error ToolCallEnd, exclusive ReservationGranted.
Track reservation expiry with 5-minute advance warnings. Add message
deep-link support in command palette. 24 new unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
